_README: Make Scenario Blueprint — Phase 4: Real-Time Error Alerting. This is a standalone scenario triggered by a webhook. Each Phase 1 scenario's error handler calls this webhook when a failure occurs. Import this BEFORE activating any Phase 1 scenarios.
_import_instructions: 1. Import this blueprint into Make as a new scenario.
2. After import, note the generated webhook URL in the 'Custom Webhook' trigger module.
3. Go back into each Phase 1 scenario (make/scenarios/phase1_*.json).
4. Add a Make 'Error Handler' route to the scenario — on error, add an HTTP module that POSTs to this webhook URL with the error payload.
5. Repeat for Phase 2 and Phase 3 scenarios.
6. Fill in [ERROR_ALERT_EMAIL] with the address from config/settings.json → make.error_alert_email.
7. Test by intentionally failing a scenario (e.g., use an invalid Sheet ID temporarily).
8. This scenario does NOT need to be cloned — one instance handles errors from all other scenarios.
_architecture_note: Error alerting is intentionally decoupled from the daily digest. The digest is a summary of normal operations. This scenario fires immediately on failure so the supervisor can act before an inbox accumulates unprocessed emails.
name: Phase 4 — Error Alert — Inbox Failure Notification

parameters._hook_comment: After import, copy the generated webhook URL and paste it into the error handler HTTP module in every Phase 1/2/3 scenario.

parameters.name: alert_html
parameters.value:
⚠️ AUTOMATION ALERT — Action Required

Time: {{1.error_timestamp}}

Affected Talent: {{1.talent_name}}

Scenario: {{1.scenario_name}}

Error Type: {{1.error_type}}

Error Message: {{1.error_message}}

{{if(1.email_subject, '

Email Subject: ' + 1.email_subject + '

', '')}} {{if(1.email_sender, '

Email Sender: ' + 1.email_sender + '

', '')}}

What to do:

  1. Check the talent's Gmail inbox — no emails will have been lost, but new emails are not being processed while the scenario is down.
  2. Go to Make → Scenarios and find the failed scenario for {{1.talent_name}}.
  3. Review the error in the scenario execution history.
  4. If the error is OAuth expiry: re-authorize the Gmail connection in Make → Connections.
  5. If the error is an OpenAI or Google Sheets error: check those services for downtime.
  6. Reactivate the scenario once the issue is resolved.
{{if(1.make_scenario_url, '

Open failed scenario in Make →

', '')}}

This is an automated alert from the Talent Inbox Automation system. See docs/failure_playbooks.md for detailed recovery steps.

parameters._connection_comment: TODO: Set this to the supervisor's Gmail connection in Make.
parameters._to_comment: TODO: Fill in the error alert recipient email from config/settings.json → make.error_alert_email. This should be the same person who receives the daily digest, or a dedicated ops address.
parameters.subject: ALERT: {{1.talent_name}} inbox automation failed — {{1.error_type}}

parameters._spreadsheetId_comment: TODO: Fill in the master log Google Sheet ID.
parameters._sheetName_comment: Create an 'Error Log' tab in the master log Google Sheet. Columns: Timestamp, Talent Name, Scenario Name, Error Type, Error Message, Email Subject, Email Sender, Resolved (blank by default — supervisor fills in when fixed).

metadata._instant_comment: true = this scenario fires immediately when the webhook is called. Required for real-time alerting.
metadata._zone_comment: TODO: Update to your Make workspace zone.

_error_payload_template._comment: This is the JSON payload that each Phase 1/2/3 scenario's error handler should POST to this webhook. Paste the Make HTTP module body as follows:

_error_log_tab_setup._comment: Before activating this scenario, manually create an 'Error Log' tab in the master log Google Sheet with these headers:

_TODO_checklist: Import this scenario first — before activating any Phase 1 scenarios
Copy the generated webhook URL from the CustomWebhook trigger module
Add an Error Handler route to every Phase 1 scenario: on error, POST the error payload JSON to this webhook URL
Repeat for Phase 2 and Phase 3 scenarios
Replace [ERROR_ALERT_EMAIL] with the address from config/settings.json → make.error_alert_email
Replace [MASTER_LOG_SHEET_ID] with the master log Sheet ID
Create the 'Error Log' tab in the master log Google Sheet with the columns listed in _error_log_tab_setup
Test by temporarily breaking a scenario (e.g. remove a connection) and confirm the alert email arrives
Confirm the alert email arrives within 1-2 minutes of the failure
